summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 1 Conversion Optimization features. minor.issue: Mixed Content warning - http:// URL being called from https:// page. This is an infrastructure/URL configuration issue, not affecting tested features.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Conversion Optimization features fully tested. Key verified components: 1) Landing page (/): Hero with 'Discover Winning Ecommerce Products Before They Go Viral' headline, social proof stats bar (dynamic from /api/public/platform-stats), How It Works 3-step section, Winning products section (from /api/public/trending-products), 3-tier pricing section (£19/£49/£99), testimonials, final CTA. 2) Pricing page (/pricing): Full pricing page with comparison table, £10,000+ revenue messaging, 7-day free trial CTAs. 3) Signup page (/signup): 'Start Free Product Discovery' CTA, no credit card required messaging. 4) Dashboard onboarding checklist: 4 steps (browse, analyse, generate ads, save product) with dismiss button, stored in localStorage by user ID.
